prompt_text:
### Demographics: 71-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 75.3 kg; Height 159.2 cm; BMI 29.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.7%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 6.1%), FPG (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 207mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 204mg/dL; current 116mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 74.8kg; 9 months ago 74.2kg; 6 months ago 72.1kg; 3 months ago 68.9kg; current 75.3kg), Height (12 months ago 159.2cm; 9 months ago 159.2cm; 6 months ago 159.2cm; 3 months ago 159.2cm; current 159.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 27.0kg/m²; current 29.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 65U/L; 9 months ago 62U/L; 6 months ago 59U/L; 3 months ago 44U/L; current 64U/L), AST (12 months ago 56U/L; 9 months ago 57U/L; 6 months ago 55U/L; 3 months ago 42U/L; current 59U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; current 32mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 254mg/g; 9 months ago 372mg/g; 6 months ago 401mg/g; 3 months ago 442mg/g; current 256mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 59mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 60mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 148mg/dL; 9 months ago 150mg/dL; 6 months ago 165mg/dL; 3 months ago 169mg/dL; current 158mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
